title: Modern Lights
description: Simple and modern-ish looking light blocks.
body:
This mod is inspired by the amazing mod [Simply Light](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simply-light) by Flanks255.

# Modern Lights
Simple to use, modern-ish looking light blocks.

<details>
<summary>What's New [v2.5.0]</summary>
  
There are not a lot of changes in this version, just some minor fixes, and couple of recipe changes

Fixes:
- Fixed broken recipes
- Fixed broken advavncements

Changes:
- New Mod icon/logo ;D
- Changed the crafting recipe of Luminous Block (Now _slightly_ expensive) [see [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-lights/gallery)]
- Added a few new recepies

New recepies:
- 2 Slabs -> 1 Blocks:  
  Craft two slabs (vertical or normal) to get their respective block variant back
- (Stonecutter) 1 Slab -> 4 Mini Block:  
  Added Mini blocks as an output for stonecutting slabs

---
For previous versions of the mod, visit [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modern-lights-mod)

</details>

> As of now, the (latest) version 2.5.0 of this mod is only available for Minecraft 1.20 and above, older versions might get supported, but no promises as to when :/


### This mod adds the following blocks:

1. Andesite Frame
2. Luminous Blocks
3. Luminous Blocks Full
4. Luminous Slabs
5. Luminous Slabs Full
6. Luminous Vertical Slab
7. Luminous Vertical Slab Full
7. Luminous Mini Blocks
8. Luminous Mini Blocks Full
9. Ceiling Lights
10. Mini Lights
11. Panels
12. Small Panels

> Note: All the blocks are available in all the 16 colors (Except Andestie Frame)

## Interactions:

- Right-click to toggle any block on/off.
- Giving a redstone signal to any block will toggle it on
- When a block is being powered by redstone, it can not be turned off by right-clicking


See [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-lights/gallery) for crafting recipes and checking out how the blocks look.

----
For suggestions and stuff :  [Discord](https://discord.gg/p8kMS6tuYN)

P.S. If you haven't noticed yet, I am bad at naming things. So name suggestions are always welcome along with other suggestions like recipe changes, new blocks, etc.
